text: The use of artificial intelligence in the workplace is growing rapidly. One major benefit is automation, where AI handles repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling. This frees up employees to focus on more complex and creative work. Many companies now use productivity tools powered by AI, such as smart assistants or software that organizes emails and meetings. However, AI is not replacing most jobs completely. Instead, we are seeing human-AI collaboration, where people work alongside AI systems to make better decisions. These job changes require new skills, so workers often need training to adapt. Overall, AI can make work more efficient if used thoughtfully.
